pdf-desc: Maareeye lagu daawado faylasha PDF ee habka sawirka
pdf-file-page-warning: PDF waa qaab fayl oo adag oo mararka qaar soo bandhigi kara qaar ka mid ah xogtaada gaarka ah. Hubi inaad si ammaan ah u dejiso daawadaha PDF-kaaga.
pdf-file-page-warning-footer: Arrintani ma aha mid gaar u ah faylkan, balse waa dhibaato guud oo ku saabsan qaabka PDF.
pdf_no_metadata: Lama heli karo xogta metadata ee PDF-ka.
pdf_page_error: Lambarka bogga kuma jiro xadka la oggol yahay.
